message:
feat: persist initial system prompt in transcript header

Add SystemPrompt field to TranscriptHeader and build it at session
creation from the profile, environment, skills, and MCP tools. This
captures the full prompt as the model would see it on its first turn,
making agent behavior debuggable from transcript data alone.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
